# Cat Break

> Free Chrome extension: when you’ve been on a site too long, a cat walks on-screen and invites you to take a break.

## What it is

Cat Break tracks **active tab time per website** and shows a **full-screen cat video** when a limit is reached — memorable, not a tiny notification. The break **auto-dismisses** after a time you choose; you can also **preview** it or **shoo** it away.

- Free, no account, no ads; data stays local (`chrome.storage`)
- **Cat** tab: default limit, auto-dismiss, **random cat** toggle, video gallery, preview
- **Settings** tab: **limit by site**, **excluded sites**, optional **only track listed sites** mode
- Overlay includes **rotating playful messages**; tries to **pause videos** (incl. common shadow-DOM players); may **mute the tab** on YouTube if pause isn’t possible
- Daily totals **reset at midnight**

## Who it’s for

People who lose track of time on social/video sites and want a **soft brake**, not a hard block.

## How it works

1. Set a **default** minutes-before-cat (chips + custom).
2. Optionally add **per-site** limits, **exclusions**, or **list-only** tracking.
3. Timer runs **only while the tab is focused**.
4. At limit → cat overlay → clears after **auto-dismiss** (or user dismisses / shoo).

## Key features

- Default + per-site limits, exclusions, list-only mode
- **Random cat** or fixed **cat video** from a growing gallery
- **Auto-dismiss** (break length) configurable
- **Preview on current tab**
- Privacy-first: no external collection (see PRIVACY.md)

## Links

- Chrome Web Store: https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/cat-break/lnmigkmapjkmfpnjlhnmdkihpnlihagh
- Privacy policy: https://github.com/parthbhodia/gatekeep-lock-chrome-extension/blob/main/PRIVACY.md
- Source: https://github.com/parthbhodia/gatekeep-lock-chrome-extension

## Pricing

Free.
